raw_source_reread_reason: Parent batch already preserved the clean local pair, the test-vs-control sign contract, the adaptive-vs-fixed nonlinearity split, the omission-versus-admission seam, and the paired-family completion boundary.
reasons_for_candidate_status: The current runner/result pair is the clean final paired-family shell in the residual paired-family campaign.
The batch preserves a reusable test-vs-control sign contract without erasing the small residual test-axis sign effects.
The adaptive-vs-fixed nonlinearity split remains the sharpest clean discriminator in this topology4 pair.
The batch preserves paired-family completion without collapsing the remaining residual classes.
reasons_for_quarantine: Clean local pairing is not treated as top-level repo evidence admission.
Control-axis success is not treated as total disappearance of test-axis sign sensitivity.
